a:r.a:t: In the discovery phase, we will estimate value at stake and identify areas of opportunity
(e.g., Sales reps time spent, sales support routines, sales coverage, pricing)
Identify sales reps pain points and challenges to contextualize areas for growth
Develop and align with sales leadership on investment required
op-down sizing to estimate the full
value at stake and prioritize commercial opportunities
by potential impact and ease of capture
